zh.lifeSummary: 當James de Bohun於1281年2月3日出生在英國素可福特時，他的父親John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst34歲，母親Joan Chapelle24歲。他於1301年與Joan de Braose在英國素可布拉波結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1367年12月13日在英國英格蘭戴文布拉德寧其享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James de Bohun于1281年2月3日出生在英国素可福特时，他的父亲John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst34岁，母亲Joan Chapelle24岁。他于1301年与Joan de Braose在英国素可布拉波结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1367年12月13日在英国英格兰戴文布拉德寧其享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bohan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, John Patrick, Brendan, Liam.
Irish (Leitrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin, from a personal name which is a diminutive of buadhach ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When James de Bohun was born on 3 February 1281, in Ford, Sussex, England, his father, John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, was 34 and his mother, Joan Chapelle, was 24. He married Joan de Braose in 1301, in Bramber, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 December 1367, in Bradninch, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James de Bohun est né le 3 février 1281, à Ford, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Chapelle, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Braose en 1301, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1367, à Bradninch, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James de Bohun am 3. Februar 1281 in Ford, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst 34 und seine Mutter Joan Chapelle 24. Er hat 1301 in Bramber, Sussex, England Joan de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1367 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Bradninch, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James de Bohun è nato il il 3 febbraio 1281 nel Ford, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan Chapelle, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Braose nel 1301, nel Bramber, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 dicembre 1367, nel Bradninch, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James de Bohunが1281年2月3日にイギリススセックスフォードで生まれた時，父John de Bohun Lord of Midhurstは34歳，母Joan Chapelleは24歳であった。1301年にイギリススセックスブランバーでJoan de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1367年12月13日にイギリスイギリスデボンブラドニンチで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James de Bohun(이)가 1281년 2월 3일 영국 수세스 포드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Chapelle(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1301년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 Joan de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1367년 12월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브라드닌치에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.3 February 1281–13 December 1367: 3 de fevereiro de 1281–13 de dezembro de 1367
pt.lifeSummary: Quando James de Bohun nasceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1281, em Ford, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Chapelle, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Braose em 1301, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1367, em Bradninch, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James de Bohun родился 3 февраля 1281 г. в местности форд, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Chapelle, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Braose в 1301 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 декабря 1367 г. в местности браднинч, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.

es.3 February 1281–13 December 1367: 3 de febrero de 1281–13 de diciembre de 1367
es.lifeSummary: Cuando James de Bohun nació el 3 de febrero de 1281, en Ford, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan Chapelle, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan de Braose en 1301, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1367, en Bradninch, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años.
